title: Ansible Playbook Unreachable Host Spike by Inventory Group
app: Splunk HTTP Event Collector with `splunk` Ansible callback plugin
spl:
index=iac sourcetype="ansible:result"
| stats sum(unreachable) as u count as runs by playbook, inventory_group
| eval unreachable_rate=round(100*u/runs,2)
| where runs>=10 AND unreachable_rate > 15
| sort -unreachable_rate
description: Unreachable bursts indicate network ACL changes, bastion loss, or credential rotation issues.
value: Prioritizes inventory segments losing connectivity before change windows close.
implementation: Ensure callback sends per-play aggregates; map `inventory_group` from limit or dynamic inventory metadata.
visualization: Bar chart (unreachable_rate by group), Table top playbooks.

references.title: AWX logging integration (job events, activity stream)
